title: localai tool definition
description: Schema version 1. Emitted by `localai tools list --json`.

name.description: Stable identifier exposed to the model.

description.description: Written for the model: what it does, when to use it.

risk.description: Severity, ordered. Drives the permission decision.

mutating.description: True if it changes state on disk.

network.description: True if it makes a network request.

returns_untrusted_content.description: True if output is file/command content the model must treat as data.

parameters.description: JSON Schema for the arguments object.
